title: Map: The maps below show part of a village in 1910, and the same part of that village i...
description: The maps below show part of a village in 1910, and the same part of that village in 2010. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features.
guide_html:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Shalton village (1910 vs 2010\)
1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự thay đổi của làng Shalton từ năm 1910 đến 2010\.

→ Dạng: map – changes over time

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ:

  • Shalton village
  • 1910 – 2010

Dùng:

  • shows → illustrates / compares
  • changes → developments / transformations

Ví dụ:

The maps illustrate how Shalton village changed between 1910 and 2010\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Ngôi làng trở nên phát triển và đô thị hóa hơn
  • Nhiều cơ sở mới được xây dựng (supermarket, bank, parking, café)
  • Nhà ở tăng đáng kể, đặc biệt dọc các tuyến đường chính
  • Một số công trình cũ bị thay thế (butcher, grocer, baker, large house)
  • Post office và school vẫn giữ nguyên
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Khu bên trái (School Road)

1910:

  • School
  • Butcher

2010:

  • School vẫn giữ
  • Butcher bị thay bằng:
  • Supermarket
  • Bank
  • Parking

Ý chính: khu này được phát triển thành khu thương mại

BODY 2 – Khu trung tâm

1910:

  • Large house ở trung tâm
  • Grocer và baker
  • Nhiều cây xanh

2010:

  • Tất cả bị loại bỏ
  • Thay bằng:
  • Café
  • Nhiều nhà ở

Ý chính: chuyển từ khu ít xây dựng sang khu dân cư

BODY 3 – Khu dọc London Road và High Street

1910:

  • Ít nhà

2010:

  • Nhà xuất hiện dày đặc dọc hai con đường
  • Post office giữ nguyên vị trí

Ý chính: mật độ dân cư tăng mạnh

5\. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be replaced by → được thay thế bởi
  • be converted into → được chuyển thành
  • be developed into → được phát triển thành
  • remain unchanged → giữ nguyên
  • residential area → khu dân cư
  • commercial facilities → cơ sở thương mại

The maps compare the layout of Shalton village in 1910 and 2010\.

Overall, the village became more residential and commercial over time, with a significant increase in housing and the replacement of small local shops by larger facilities.

In 1910, the village had a relatively simple structure centred around a triangular area formed by London Road, School Road, and High Street. This area contained a large house surrounded by trees, along with a grocer and a baker. To the west, along School Road, there was a school and a butcher. The post office was located near London Road, while only a small number of houses were found, mainly along High Street and in the northeast.

By 2010, the central triangular area had been redeveloped into a residential zone with numerous houses, and the original large house, grocer, and baker had disappeared. A café was introduced in this area. On School Road, the butcher was replaced by a supermarket, and additional facilities such as a bank and a car park were added nearby, while the school remained. The number of houses increased significantly, particularly along London Road and High Street, whereas the post office stayed in the same location.
